title: tripleurospermum caucasicum
intro: Tripleurospermum caucasicum, also known as Caucasus meadow-sweet, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Tripleurospermum caucasicum, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application, offering relief from congestion and skin irritations.
